images.title: Raw Material Supply System
images.description: Special tanks and raw material mixing system located at the top of the line. Here, components for the inner part of the panel are prepared.

images.title: Cold Room Assembly Workshop
images.description: Central control unit for the entire line. The production process is fully digitized, minimizing human factor.

images.title: Conveyor and Forming Section
images.description: Long conveyor line for forming and moving finished panels. Equipped with special safety markings.

images.title: Hydraulic Pressing System
images.description: Hydraulic piston system for pressing panels under high pressure and ensuring density.

images.title: Finished Product Output Section
images.description: Section where finished sandwich panels are directed for packaging. Here panels undergo inspection according to specified dimensions.

pir-devor.name: PIR Wall Panel
pir-devor.description: Energy-efficient PIR sandwich panels designed for building walls. Highest thermal insulation performance.
details: Installation: Hidden and open locking system

pur-tom.name: Roofing Panel
pur-tom.description: 5-rib (trapezoidal) roof sandwich panels providing perfect protection against rain and snow.
details: Thermal Retention: Protection from cold and heat
Colors: Any color according to RAL catalog

agregat.name: Stainless PIR Panel
agregat.description: Special stainless steel panels for food industry and pharmaceutical applications.
details: Hygiene: Smooth surface preventing bacterial growth
Durability: Resistant to acids and aggressive detergents
Standard: Full compliance with SanPiN regulations

eshik.name: Cooler Door (Standard)
eshik.description: Lightweight and reliable door design for medium-temperature cold rooms.

profil.name: Cooler Door (Aluminum)
profil.description: Aluminum frame reinforced doors, aesthetically pleasing and corrosion-resistant.

burchak.name: Freezer Door (F3)
burchak.description: Special door designed for low-temperature freezing chambers (up to -25°C).
details: Heating: Heating cable (HE) along the frame
Anti-freeze: Door seals do not freeze

kondensator.name: Industrial Door (F4)
kondensator.description: Large-format industrial doors for big warehouses and factories.
details: Dimensions: Suitable for large machinery entry

kompressor.name: Reinforced Door (F5)
kompressor.description: Reinforced model with 3 hinges for rooms operating under constant heavy loads.

kopik.name: Special Cooling Door
kopik.description: Highly moisture and cold resistant doors with special plastic coating.
details: Cleanliness: Suitable for medical and lab use

fiting.name: Fittings and Fasteners
fiting.description: All necessary components for installing sandwich panels and cold room doors.
details: Screws: Various sizes for panel fixing
Corners: Aluminum and plastic corner profiles

ventilyator.name: Industrial Fan
ventilyator.description: High-performance fans for cooling systems and condenser blocks.
details: Protection: IP54/IP55 water and dust protection

panel.name: Sandwich Panel (EPS)
panel.description: Affordable and lightweight sandwich panels with expanded polystyrene (EPS) filler.
details: Weight: Very light, easy to install

evaporator.name: Bitzer Piston Compressor
evaporator.description: Reliable compressor from the German brand Bitzer, the heart of cooling systems.
details: Repair: Easy to repair due to semi-hermetic design

fiksator.name: Condensing Unit
details: Refrigerant: Compatible with R404A, R134a, R22

binolar.name: Bitzer Condensing Unit
binolar.description: Professional cooling station for industrial freezers based on Bitzer compressor.
details: Ready Solution: All parts factory assembled
Application: Fruit-vegetable storage and meat processing
